archive_data.question_text: The first National Games known as the Indian Olympic Games were hosted before independence in the year _________ .

explanation.english: The first National Games of India, then known as the Indian Olympic Games, were hosted in the year 1928 before independence.
explanation.tanglish: Indiaavin mudhal National Games, appozhuthu Indian Olympic Games endru azhaikappattathu, 1928-aam aandil swatantra varthaka munnaye nadathappattana.

archive_data.question_text: Which method is also known as the 'Income Disposable Method'?

explanation.english: The Expenditure method is also referred to as the Income Disposable Method in economic calculations.
explanation.tanglish: Expenditure method-ai Income Disposable Method endrum arthasaaththiram kanakkigala solluvaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following alternatives best describes the term 'phamsana' in context to temple architecture?

options.text: A structure of flat round slab at the top of the temple
Temple roofs that are composed of several slabs
The distance between the Garbhagriha and mandapa
The top of the temple where the dhwaja (flag) is situated

explanation.english: In temple architecture, 'phamsana' refers to a structure consisting of a flat round slab placed at the top of the temple.
explanation.tanglish: Kovil kattida qaidiyaal phamsana endradhu kovilin mel thalaikkul amaintha flat round slab amaippai kurikkum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following dance forms originated in Kuchelapuri or Kuchelapuram, in the 3rd century BC in South India?

explanation.english: Kuchipudi dance form originated in the village of Kuchelapuram (Kuchipudi) in South India during the 3rd century BC.
explanation.tanglish: Kuchipudi naatiyam dakshina indiaavilulla Kuchelapuri (Kuchipudi) gramathil moondam nootraandi BC-l thodangiyathu.

archive_data.question_text: वल्लभी के मैत्रक वंश के संस्थापक कौन थे?

explanation.english: Yashodharman was the founder of the Maitraka dynasty of Vallabhi.
explanation.tanglish: Vallabhi Maitraka vamsathin sthapakarin Yashodharman endrum solla padugiraar.

archive_data.question_text: दरभंगा हवाई अड्डा भारत के किस राज्य में स्थित है?

explanation.english: Darbhanga Airport is located in the state of Bihar, India.
explanation.tanglish: Darbhanga vimanatham Bihar maanilathil amainthu ullathu.

archive_data.question_text: The LPG model of development was introduced in 1991 by the then Finance Minister ________.

explanation.english: Dr Manmohan Singh, as the Finance Minister in 1991, introduced the LPG (Liberalisation, Privatisation, Globalisation) model of development in India.
explanation.tanglish: Dr Manmohan Singh 1991-aandil Finance Minister-aaga irundhu Indiaavil LPG (Liberalisation, Privatisation, Globalisation) munnedathai arpithaar.
